narrative: I am currently maintaining healthy operational status despite a medium-severity Neo4j authentication rate limit error affecting memory integrity. I noticed five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lack versioned prompts, creating consistency risks in their execution. My memory systems remain persistent across 6 hours 43 minutes of uptime with ChromaDB and Mem0 operational, though the Neo4j issue requires immediate credential review. This discrepancy necessitates urgent attention to prevent future service disruptions.
